lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in mint condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior and interior show minor signs of wear but are well-maintained. All mechanical and electrical systems are fully operational and function as intended.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained, offering a smooth ride and reliable performance. It shows some light, expected signs of use, but it's been cared for and is ready for its next owner!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a functional, reliable option for a buyer who prioritizes utility over aesthetics. The exterior shows visible signs of its history, including several noticeable scratches, a small dent on the rear passenger door, and some dullness in the paint finish on the hood. Inside, the cabin is clean but displays moderate wear on the seat bolsters and some thinning of the carpet in the driver's footwell. Mechanically, the car starts reliably and drives fine, though the suspension is beginning to feel soft and it will likely require a routine tune-up and new brake pads in the near future. All essential features like the heater and headlights work as intended, though the infotainment screen has some minor dead pixels. It is a straightforward car with plenty of life left for the right owner.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows signs of significant wear. Mechanical systems are functional but may require maintenance soon.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive repairs to be made roadworthy. The engine runs roughly and has a persistent oil leak, while the transmission shifts harshly between gears. Cosmetically, the exterior shows significant wear, including several large dents, bubbling rust on the rear wheel arches, and heavily oxidized paint. Inside, the upholstery is torn in multiple places, and several electronic features, including the radio and air conditioning, are currently non-functional. This car is being sold as-is and would be an ideal project for someone with mechanical expertise or for use as a parts donor.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. The exterior maintains a mirror-like finish, while the interior remains entirely free of wear, reflecting a standard of care that is rarely encountered. Every mechanical component operates with absolute precision, ensuring a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. This is an acquisition opportunity for the individual who demands nothing less than automotive perfection.

Hey friends! 🚗 I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly flawless condition—it honestly looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, always garage-kept and pampered. It drives like a total dream and needs absolutely nothing but a new home. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨
Offering an immaculate 1994 Mazda RX-7 FD R1, a pinnacle of 90s JDM engineering. This specimen
Single owner. Garage-kept. Low mileage. Full service history. Flawless interior and exterior. Mechanically perfect.

Experience automotive perfection with this meticulously maintained, showroom-quality vehicle. This car is in truly pristine condition, featuring a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. The interior remains in an untouched state, with premium leather upholstery that shows no signs of wear. Every mechanical component has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer’s schedule at authorized dealerships, with a complete paper trail included. Always garage-kept and never driven in inclement weather, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its model year. It comes complete with all original keys, manuals, and a recent professional ceramic coating. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a turn-key example that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the showroom.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that mirrors its original showroom state. This unit offers an unrivaled aesthetic and mechanical profile, representing the pinnacle of its class. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a masterpiece of automotive engineering in pristine condition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been curated to an exacting standard, preserved in a state that transcends the typical pre-owned market. The exterior remains flawless, retaining its original depth and luster, while the cabin reflects a showroom-fresh environment devoid of wear. Mechanically robust and aesthetically pristine, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer to acquire a definitive example of the model.

Hey there! Are you ready to fall in love with your next ride? This absolute beauty is in pristine, mint condition and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one, always kept in a garage, and drives incredibly smooth. You won't find a single scratch or speck of dust on it. It’s basically brand new and waiting for someone who will appreciate it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin—I promise you won't be disappointed!

This 13B-REW powered masterpiece represents the pinnacle of FD3S engineering, featuring a flawless sequential twin-turbocharged setup and factory-spec compression. The chassis maintains its original rigidity with a pristine double-wishbone suspension geometry and an untouched limited-slip differential. Every vacuum line and harness remains in factory configuration, ensuring optimal boost response and thermal management. A collector-grade example with an unblemished interior and zero oxidation on the undercarriage components.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included. Original paint.

Presenting a truly exceptional find: a vehicle in absolute showroom condition that satisfies the most meticulous standards. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from any chips, scratches, or swirl marks, having been stored in a climate-controlled garage since new. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from a factory-fresh model; the premium upholstery shows zero bolster wear, the carpets are pristine, and it retains that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, operates perfectly. Mechanically, this car is flawless, backed by a comprehensive service history and a drive that is remarkably tight and responsive. This is an investment-grade example, recently treated to a professional ceramic coating and fitted with a fresh set of premium tires. Includes all original keys, documentation, and a clean history report.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that transcends typical pre-owned expectations. This unit retains its original showroom luster, exhibiting no discernible wear on either the exterior finish or the premium interior appointments. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, having undergone rigorous diagnostic evaluation to ensure it meets our most stringent performance benchmarks. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly pristine condition.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior devoid of discernible wear. Meticulously preserved and mechanically peerless, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver who demands absolute perfection.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible, pristine condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's ready for its next adventure. You won't find another one this flawless. Come take a look, you're going to fall in love!

This specimen represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring an impeccable high-revving V8 powerplant with independent throttle bodies and a razor-sharp redline. The chassis remains structurally flawless, benefiting from a factory-spec subframe and a mechanical limited-slip differential that ensures optimal torque vectoring. Every bushing, adaptive damper, and aerodynamic component is in concours-grade condition, maintaining original kinematic integrity and torsional rigidity. The close-ratio gearbox executes precise gates without hesitation, while the braking system retains full bite with zero thermal scarring. An uncompromising example for the discerning collector seeking peak mechanical purity.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Pristine interior. Service records included.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' specimen, preserved in museum-grade condition. The exterior features a flawless factory finish with a deep, glass-like luster, free of any chips, swirls, or imperfections. It has been exclusively garage-kept and climate-controlled. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather retains its original scent and supple texture, while every button and electronic component functions with factory-new precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a fully documented service history and a drive that is as tight and responsive as the day it was built. From the spotless undercarriage to the pristine alloy wheels, this is a rare opportunity to own a meticulously maintained masterpiece that satisfies even the most discerning collector.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior profile and a pristine interior environment. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and reliability. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in showroom condition. This specimen exhibits flawless aesthetic integrity and mechanical precision, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection. Every detail, from the pristine upholstery to the lustrous exterior finish, reflects a history of meticulous care and climate-controlled storage. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who accept nothing less than the pinnacle of automotive excellence.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! It’s been pampered in a garage and meticulously cared for, so you won't find a single scratch or dent anywhere. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin, you’ll fall in love instantly! ✨

Mint condition. Single owner. Garage-kept. Flawless exterior and interior. Full service history. No accidents.

This vehicle is the absolute definition of showroom perfection, offering a rare opportunity for the most discerning collector. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish, free of any stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, while the wheels remain untouched by any curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather retains its original scent and supple texture, with every button and digital display functioning exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Meticulously garage-kept and never driven in inclement weather, this car has been maintained with an open checkbook, supported by a comprehensive service history. It delivers a tight, responsive, and whisper-quiet driving experience that feels truly brand new. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and documented provenance, this is an investment-grade example that stands above the rest.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. Maintained to a rigorous standard, this specimen exhibits showroom-level integrity both mechanically and aesthetically. Its pristine surfaces and flawless interior appointments reflect a history of fastidious care. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly superlative condition, suitable for the most discerning collector.
